summarization.a: The polar chart displays Al₂O₃ ALE etch rate (nm/cycle) across the wafer as a function of radius (cm) and polar angle; color scale from 0.131 to 0.139 nm/cycle shows that the highest etch is near the center.

a.question: What is the maximum Al₂O₃ etch rate shown on the color scale?
Which spatial coordinates are used to describe the etch-rate map in this figure?
a.answer:
-) Radius from the wafer center (cm)

-) Polar angle around the wafer (degrees)

a.question: Does the wafer center etch faster than the outer radial zone in this ALE run?
Does the figure confirm that the Al₂O₃ ALE etch rate decreases toward the wafer edge, consistent with the statement that the uniformity is about ±3% from minimum to maximum?
